title: Create: Cobblemon Factory
description: Auto farm Cobblemon balls with Create
body:
**Cobblemon's Create addon**

This mod brings up a way to auto farm Cobblemon balls with Create, making it easier to gather balls to catch those fantastic creatures!

**Features**

Cobblemon Factory allows everyone to make Poké Balls with Create and automate the process so that you could make Poké Balls even if you are offline or AFK. As of the moment, there are all the current available Poké Balls in Cobblemon to automate with Create. You need the right apricorns to automate Poké Balls, i've made sure to make the crafting for each one less expensive but I'm open to suggestions to improve the mod in my Discord server. Remember that each Poké Ball should be created with the Mixin mechanic on Create. I'd suggest to download a mod like or [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) to check the actual craftings for the Poké Balls. In the future I will add a wiki with all the craftings inside the mod within Create.
